subtitle: Review product obligations and high-impact constraints before freezing design inputs.

sections.title: Obligations that Define Scope
sections.label: Obligations
sections.why: Lead with the highest-impact obligations under approval.

sections.title: Integration, Data, and Validation Hotspots
sections.label: Hotspots
sections.why: Keep external contracts and rule hotspots scan-friendly.

sections.title: Non-Functional and Technical Constraints
sections.label: Constraints
sections.why: Show the constraints most likely to shape design.

sections.title: Decisions Required for Approval
sections.label: Decision Gate
sections.why: State the requirement-level yes/no calls explicitly.

sections.title: Requirement Risks and TODO: Confirm Items
sections.label: Open Issues
sections.why: Expose unresolved details that would distort technical design.

sections.title: Traceability Map
sections.label: Evidence
sections.why: Tie approval claims to exact requirement evidence.

sections.title: Validator Status
sections.label: Validation
sections.why: Show requirements and approval-view validation status.

sections.title: Downstream Impact if Approved
sections.label: Impact
sections.why: Clarify what technical design may now treat as fixed.
